title: Campaign Vertical
description: Product category or industry vertical for a campaign. Governance agents use verticals to activate jurisdiction-specific rules — for example, US fair housing (FHA), equal credit (ECOA), and equal employment (EEOC) rules restrict demographic targeting for housing, credit, and employment campaigns respectively. EU DSA Article 26 applies horizontal restrictions for all verticals in EU markets. When multiple verticals could apply (e.g., a mortgage product is both 'housing' and 'credit'), choose the most specific value with the strictest regulatory requirements.

enumDescriptions.housing: Real estate sales, rentals, mortgage lending, home insurance. US Fair Housing Act (FHA) prohibits targeting by race, color, religion, sex, disability, familial status, or national origin. Similar restrictions in UK Equality Act 2010.
enumDescriptions.employment: Job listings, recruiting, workforce services. US EEOC rules and Title VII prohibit targeting by race, sex, age (40+), religion, national origin, disability. EU Employment Equality Directive applies in EU markets.
enumDescriptions.credit: Credit cards, loans, financial products involving credit decisions. US Equal Credit Opportunity Act (ECOA) prohibits targeting by race, color, religion, national origin, sex, marital status, age, or public assistance status.
enumDescriptions.insurance: Insurance products and services. Regulated at state/national level with restrictions on using certain attributes (health status, genetic information) for targeting. US ACA and state insurance codes apply.
enumDescriptions.healthcare: Health services, hospitals, telehealth, medical devices. US HIPAA considerations for health data in targeting. EU GDPR Article 9 treats health data as special category. For prescription drug or pharmaceutical advertising, use 'pharmaceutical' instead.
enumDescriptions.pharmaceutical: Prescription drugs, OTC medications, drug manufacturers (DTC advertising). US FDA requires fair balance and major statement of risks. EU prohibits DTC advertising of prescription drugs entirely. Distinct from 'healthcare' because of FDA/EMA-specific advertising requirements.
enumDescriptions.alcohol: Alcoholic beverages. Age-gating required in most jurisdictions. US TTB regulations, UK ASA Code. Many platforms require 21+ (US) or 18+ (EU/UK) age targeting.
enumDescriptions.gambling: Betting, casino, lottery, fantasy sports. Heavily regulated per jurisdiction. UK Gambling Act 2005, US state-by-state legality. Self-exclusion list compliance required where available.
enumDescriptions.cannabis: Cannabis and CBD products. US federal/state conflict — legal in some states, federally prohibited. Geo-restriction to legal jurisdictions required. No targeting of minors.
enumDescriptions.firearms: Firearms, ammunition, accessories. Restricted or prohibited on most major platforms. Jurisdiction-specific regulations apply.
enumDescriptions.political: Political candidates, ballot measures, issue advocacy. US FEC disclaimer requirements, EU DSA political ad transparency. Many jurisdictions require ad libraries and targeting disclosure.
enumDescriptions.financial_services: Banking, investment, fintech (excluding credit — use 'credit' for lending products). SEC/FINRA fair disclosure rules in US. FCA regulations in UK. MiFID II in EU.
enumDescriptions.education: Educational institutions, degree programs, vocational training. US FTC scrutiny on for-profit education advertising. Restrictions on misleading claims about outcomes.
enumDescriptions.children: Products or content directed at minors (toys, children's media, educational products for kids). This is about the product category, not the audience — a financial services ad targeting parents is not 'children'. US COPPA (under 13), UK Age Appropriate Design Code (AADC, under 18), EU GDPR Article 8 (parental consent under 16, member states may lower to 13). Most restrictive applicable rule applies.
enumDescriptions.other: Vertical not covered by a specific category. Governance agents apply only the plan's explicit policies and restricted_attributes without vertical-specific regulatory rules.
